preferred_source: Copernicus Land Monitoring Service Global Dynamic Land Cover
schema_note: Kairós Exposure is designed to summarize approximate agricultural and riparian land-cover context around AOI nodes once an official CLMS/CDSE raster pull is connected. Current rows remain data_pending when no official land-cover composition has been obtained.
claim_limit: Capa de exposición preparada en esquema. Valores territoriales pendientes; no se usa como evidencia principal en la demo.

observations.land_cover_source: Copernicus Land Monitoring Service Global Dynamic Land Cover (official pull pending)
observations.notes: Kairós Exposure mantiene el esquema preparado para composición territorial oficial por nodo. Valores territoriales pendientes hasta completar un resumen zonal CLMS/CDSE; no sustituye verificación territorial, laboratorio ni autoridad competente.
